description: Rebound FS 3 shoes from puma are a perfect choice for all speed freaks. These shoes, inspired by ferrari's style and class, are perfect for those who love a little show off drama in their casual ensembles.UpperHigh top foamy rubber upper with synthetic overlays for durability and protectionLace-ups for snug FitPadded ankle supportLightly padded collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for extra comfortJumping cat logo embroidered on the tongue and the back of the collarMidsoleEco-friendly EcoOrtholite insole gives breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties, and long term cushioningEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleRubber traction outsole and heel bumper for better protection to the heel and better gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
